roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT, 1381PC LDTR 10-05-21/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/X: 1381 LD 10-05-21/CONTD:  TRIAL/SB: 1 HOUR/

/CAL:DEF REQUET FOR COURT ORDER TO MODIFY EM/NP/CTORD:EM IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWING: DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO TRAVEL TO STOCKTON TO PICK UP CLOTHING ON 09-15-21 BETWEEN 8AM TO 4PM, DEFENDANT IS REMINDED NOT TO DRIVE/X:HEARING ON 09-28-21 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:JUSTIN BLANKEN, CHP/X:DEFENSE 17B MOTION IS DENIED/  /HTA1:1/X:MISDEMEANOR COUNTS 2 & 3 ARE CERTIFIED/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22/TWA/DOP/X:(1381PC LAST DAY FOR TRIAL IS 10-05-21)/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONT/DOP/NTW60/LD:10-12-21/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ONTHE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:(1381 LAST DAY 10-05-21)/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-25-21/X: 1381 DEMAND LAST DAY FOR JURY TRIAL 10-8-21/X: THE 30TH DAY IS 09-23-21 AND THE 60TH DAY IS 10-12-21/987,2/BAIL:75,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: AS A CONDITION OF BAIL THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT DRIVE/CONTD:BAIL HRG(CUSTODY STATUS) ON 08-17-21, PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 08-25-21/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, PC1381 LD 10-05-21/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM/MO PC 1385: 1STDISMISSAL (OFFICER UNAVAILABLE)/EMTERM/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL LD 10-05-21 (PC1381)/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM/X:THE PEOPLE AND DEFENSE ARE READY FOR TRIAL/CONT/
